meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop chasing clients with an empty portfolio. Learn to build passive income assets using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate developer checklist.
content.answer_block: Transform your 'no portfolio' bottleneck into a passive income engine by building micro-SaaS tools. Use Antigravity to scaffold production-ready codebases and Claude Code to iterate at lightning speed. By shipping small, solved-problem utilities, you create a living portfolio that earns revenue while demonstrating your technical authority to high-ticket clients.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent portfolio echoing in your inbox. Every potential client asks for proof of work, and you have nothing but raw ambition and a list of 'what-ifs.' The cycle of begging for work while lacking the evidence to command premium rates is a trap that kills careers before they truly begin.

But what if you stopped waiting for permission to build? By shifting from a service-only mindset to an asset-building strategy, you convert your downtime into a portfolio of passive income tools. This isn't just about code; it's about building a digital footprint that sells your expertise 24/7, allowing you to bypass the gatekeepers and command the room.

steps.title: Identify a Micro-Pain Point
steps.description: Select a niche problem that takes 10 minutes of manual work but can be automated. This ensures a low barrier to entry and immediate market viability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following niche: [Insert Niche]. Generate a list of 5 repetitive manual tasks that could be automated into a micro-SaaS tool.

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a clean, scalable architecture that handles authentication and payments out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, Supabase auth, and Stripe integration. Ensure the architecture follows clean code principles.

steps.title: Implement Core Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to rapidly write the business logic, focusing on performance and security over complex UI fluff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust server-side function to process user data and store it in Supabase, including error handling and input validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --write 'Implement logic for [Feature Name] in src/lib/actions.ts'

steps.title: Automate Deployment & Scaling
steps.description: Ensure your tool is live and accessible. A portfolio piece that isn't public is a secret, not an asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and Vercel deployment on every push to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --deploy 'configure github actions and vercel.json'

steps.title: Configure Passive Monetization
steps.description: Integrate Stripe billing to turn your portfolio piece into a recurring revenue stream, demonstrating business acumen to future clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to manage subscription status updates in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --write 'Setup stripe webhook handler in app/api/webhooks/route.ts'

pro_tips: Build for search intent, not just functionality; if people aren't searching for the problem, your passive income will remain passive indefinitely.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; this makes your 'portfolio' look like a professional, well-maintained engineering project.
Keep your micro-SaaS scope so small that you can deploy it in a weekend; speed is your primary competitive advantage as a freelancer.
Display your 'Stack' prominently on the landing page; clients don't just want the tool, they want to see that you can build one for them too.
Always include a 'Request a Custom Feature' button; this is your lead generation funnel masquerading as a product feature.
content.next_steps: Once your first tool is live, spend 20% of your time on maintenance and 80% on shipping your second, more complex micro-SaaS to expand your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting an empty portfolio dictate your freelance rates. When you build assets that solve real problems, you stop being a commodity and start being an authority. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
